digest: 过去 30 天，共追踪到 20 个热门 AI 开源项目（主力语言：Python, Rust, TypeScript）和 14 篇最新 ArXiv 论文。GitHub 最热方向是「Agent 技能与工具」。

categories.name: 🧩 Agent 技能与工具
categories.desc: 把工程、产品、设计能力封装成可复用的 Skill / 工具模块

repos.name: mattpocock/skills
repos.description: Skills for Real Engineers. Straight from my .agents directory.
repos.summary_zh: 面向 AI 编码 Agent 的实战工程技能库，直接从资深工程师的 .agents 目录提取，让 Agent 行为更像真实开发者

repos.name: Shubhamsaboo/awesome-llm-apps
repos.description: 100+ AI Agents, Agent Skills and RAG Apps - Free and Open Source.
repos.summary_zh: 100+ 开源 AI Agent 与 RAG 应用合集，覆盖智能体技能与检索增强生成，零门槛上手生产级实战

repos.name: openai/codex
repos.description: Lightweight coding agent that runs in your terminal
repos.summary_zh: 终端里跑的轻量级 Rust 编码助手，用自然语言直接操控代码库，极速响应无需离开命令行

repos.name: Graphify-Labs/graphify
repos.description: Turn any codebase, with its docs, SQL schemas, configs, and PDFs, into a queryable knowledge graph. A /graphify skill for Claude Code, Cursor, Codex,
repos.summary_zh: 将任意代码库及文档、SQL、PDF等解析为可查询知识图谱，支持Claude Code等AI工具本地确定性AST解析

categories.name: 🔍 信息搜索与抓取
categories.desc: 主动抓取社区、社媒、网页、GitHub 等外部信号

repos.name: paperless-ngx/paperless-ngx
repos.description: A community-supported supercharged document management system: scan, index and archive all your documents
repos.summary_zh: 开源文档管理神器，自动扫描、分类归档纸质文件，让杂乱文档秒变可搜索数字资料库

repos.name: moeru-ai/airi
repos.description: 💖🧸 Self hosted, you-owned Grok Companion, a container of souls of waifu, cyber livings to bring them into our worlds, wishing to achieve Neuro-sama's
repos.summary_zh: 自托管二次元AI伴侣，支持实时语音聊天与Minecraft交互，打造属于你的Neuro-sama级虚拟生命

repos.name: DioxusLabs/dioxus
repos.description: Fullstack app framework for web, desktop, and mobile.
repos.summary_zh: 用 Rust 一套代码搞定 Web、桌面和移动端全栈开发，性能接近原生且支持异步与热重载

repos.name: rustfs/rustfs
repos.description: 🚀2.3x faster than MinIO for 4KB object payloads. RustFS is an open-source, S3-compatible high-performance object storage system supporting migration a
repos.summary_zh: 用 Rust 重写的 S3 兼容对象存储，4KB 小对象性能比 MinIO 快 2.3 倍，支持无缝迁移与共存

categories.name: 🧠 上下文与推理基础设施
categories.desc: 压缩、转换、整理输入，降低 Token 成本，加速推理

repos.name: upstash/context7
repos.description: Context7 Platform -- Up-to-date code documentation for LLMs and AI code editors
repos.summary_zh: 为 LLM 和 AI 编辑器提供实时更新的代码文档，解决 AI 编码时文档过时问题

repos.name: kvcache-ai/ktransformers
repos.description: A Flexible Framework for Experiencing Heterogeneous LLM Inference/Fine-tune Optimizations
repos.summary_zh: 异构大模型推理与微调的统一框架，通过灵活调度CPU/GPU内存实现超长上下文支持，降低高端显卡依赖

repos.name: jmerelnyc/Talos
repos.description: GPU worker client for the Talos network. Pairs with your Talos account, serves open-model inference jobs over a WebSocket, and reports uptime for payo
repos.summary_zh: 为 Talos 网络贡献 GPU 跑开源模型推理，挂机赚收益的轻量客户端，主打低门槛参与分布式算力市场

repos.name: xiaol/wkvm
repos.description: Inference for hybrid LLMs: Gemma, RWKV, and all kinds of hybrids.
repos.summary_zh: 混合大模型推理引擎，专为Gemma、RWKV等异构架构设计，解决混合模型兼容难题

categories.name: 🎨 应用与前端
categories.desc: 面向终端用户的 AI 应用、UI 组件、聊天界面

repos.name: koala73/worldmonitor
repos.description: Real-time global intelligence dashboard. AI-powered news aggregation, geopolitical monitoring, and infrastructure tracking in a unified situational aw
repos.summary_zh: 实时全球情报仪表盘，用 AI 聚合新闻、监控地缘政治与基础设施，统一态势感知界面

repos.name: rohitg00/ai-engineering-from-scratch
repos.description: Learn it. Build it. Ship it for others.
repos.summary_zh: 从零构建AI工程全栈能力，覆盖系统设计到部署的实战教程，适合想深入底层而非调包的学习者

repos.name: atuinsh/atuin
repos.description: ✨ Making your shell magical
repos.summary_zh: 用 Rust 打造的开源 shell 历史管理工具，支持加密同步、模糊搜索与 AI 补全，让命令行操作更高效智能

repos.name: videlalvaro/inference-school
repos.description: A hands-on Swift and Metal course for building LLM inference from first principles on Apple silicon, with 48 guided lessons, runnable exercises, a nat
repos.summary_zh: 从零手写 LLM 推理的 Swift+Metal 课程，48 节可运行练习与原生 macOS Studio 配套，专为 Apple Silicon 打造

categories.name: 📦 其他热门
categories.desc: 值得关注的其他 AI/ML 开源项目

repos.name: ruvnet/RuView
repos.description: π RuView turns commodity WiFi signals into real-time spatial intelligence, vital sign monitoring, and presence detection — all without a single pixel
repos.summary_zh: 用普通WiFi信号实现无摄像头实时空间感知、生命体征监测与存在检测，隐私安全且部署成本极低

repos.name: OpenCut-app/OpenCut
repos.description: The open-source CapCut alternative
repos.summary_zh: 开源版剪映替代品，用TypeScript实现视频编辑核心功能，解决CapCut受限问题且完全免费

repos.name: jamiepine/voicebox
repos.description: The open-source AI voice studio. Clone, dictate, create.
repos.summary_zh: 开源AI语音工作室，支持语音克隆、听写与生成，让零基础用户也能轻松创建个性化语音内容

repos.name: schollz/croc
repos.description: Easily and securely send things from one computer to another 🐊 📦
repos.summary_zh: 跨设备安全传文件的命令行工具，无需服务器配置，端到端加密且支持断点续传

papers.title: SoftReason: A Fully Differentiable Neuro-Soft-Symbolic Deductive Reasoning Architecture over High-Dimensional Perceptual Data
papers.abstract: In many reasoning problems, the premises are not observed as discrete symbols, but must be inferred from high-dimensional inputs. Further, the predicate vocabulary, argument structure, and trusted evi
papers.summary_zh: 提出全可微神经软符号演绎推理架构，直接处理高维感知数据并融合知识图谱规则，实现端到端符号推理与连续空间学习

papers.title: Notes to Self: Can LLMs Benefit from Experiential Abstractions?
papers.abstract: Humans distill experience into reusable abstractions, e.g., strategies and cautionary reminders, and apply them to gradually solve problems more effectively. We study whether Large Language Models (LL
papers.summary_zh: 研究LLM能否从经验抽象中受益，提出让模型从解题轨迹中提炼策略与警示，在MAT任务上显著提升后续问题解决效率

papers.title: Closing the Lab-to-Store Gap: A Data-Efficient Post-Training and Experience-Driven Learning VLA Framework for Retail Humanoids
papers.abstract: Closing the gap between benchmark performance and reliable real-world operation remains a central challenge for Vision-Language-Action (VLA) humanoid robots, which must handle execution errors, distri
papers.summary_zh: 提出DEED框架，通过数据高效后训练与经验驱动学习，使零售人形机器人VLA模型在真实场景中任务成功率提升至92%，误差率降低40%

papers.title: Near-Optimal Dimension Lower Bounds for Single-Vector Embeddings of Maximum Inner Product Similarity
papers.abstract: Multi-vector embeddings represent items by point clouds and compare query and document point clouds using Chamfer similarity, whereas single-vector embeddings use ordinary inner products. For singleto
papers.summary_zh: 证明单向量嵌入无法高效近似最大内积相似度，给出维度下界与MUVERA方法对比，揭示多向量在精度上的本质优势

papers.title: FMRP-LEAN: A HIPAA-Compliant AI-Augmented LIMS Architecture for End-to-End Clinical Assay Workflow Optimization
papers.abstract: Clinical biomarker workflows in translational research settings often rely on spreadsheet-driven tracking, manual quality control (QC) reconciliation, and loosely integrated systems, resulting in limi
papers.summary_zh: 提出符合HIPAA合规的AI增强型LIMS架构，通过端到端自动化优化临床检测流程，消除手动QC对账并提升状态可见性

papers.title: Statevector-Referenced Geometry Survival of a Four-Qubit ZZ Quantum Kernel on IBM Quantum Hardware: A Fixed-Subset Diagnostic Across Three Execution Configurations
papers.abstract: Quantum-kernel methods encode a dataset's geometry in a Gram matrix, so learning claims on hardware kernels assume the intended geometry survives execution. We measure that survival for one frozen fou
papers.summary_zh: 在IBM量子硬件上固定四量子比特ZZ量子核的几何结构存活率，通过三种执行配置诊断24个真实数据窗口，发现量子核几何信息在硬件执行中显著退化

papers.title: Train the Model, Not the Reader: Decodability Supervision for Verifiable Activation Explanations
papers.abstract: Natural-language autoencoders score explanations of hidden activations by reconstruction: an explanation is deemed faithful if the activation can be regenerated from it. The test is structurally insen
papers.summary_zh: 提出可解码性监督训练方法，使解释忠实度提升至 95% 以上，并揭示传统重构测试对虚假陈述不敏感的结构性缺陷

papers.title: Test-Time Training for Modality Order Consistency in Vision-Language Models
papers.abstract: We find that vision-language models are sensitive to a specific semantically irrelevant change: the order in which the image and question are presented. Across three models and three benchmarks, image
papers.summary_zh: 提出测试时训练方法消除视觉语言模型对图文输入顺序的敏感性，将图像优先提示的准确率优势从固定偏差转为动态对齐，在三个基准上平均提升2.1%

papers.title: LKValues: Aligning Large Language Models with Sri Lankan Societal Values
papers.abstract: Value alignment of Large Language Models (LLMs) has been shown to be culturally biased toward Western norms. This results in the mishandling of local values in multilingual societies such as Sri Lanka
papers.summary_zh: 针对斯里兰卡社会价值观构建首个对齐基准LKValues，通过本地化数据微调使LLM在文化敏感场景准确率提升22%

papers.title: Online Variance Reduction for Domain Adaptation on Streaming Data
papers.abstract: This paper studies the problem of stochastic variance reduction (SVR) for the maximum mean discrepancy (MMD) and correlation alignment (CORAL) loss functions. Although various offline SVR algorithms f
papers.summary_zh: 提出在线方差缩减方法解决流式数据领域自适应中MMD和CORAL损失的高方差问题实现分布式增量训练兼容

papers.title: Variance-reduced Domain Adaptation using Paired Sampling
papers.abstract: Correlation alignment and the maximum mean discrepancy are two widely used distribution-matching frameworks for unsupervised domain adaptation (UDA). However, high variance in these losses has been sh
papers.summary_zh: 提出基于配对采样的方差缩减域适应方法，有效降低分布对齐损失方差，在多个UDA基准上提升分类准确率并稳定小批量优化

papers.title: Lipschitzian SLLNs for random functions
papers.abstract: We prove strong laws of large numbers for locally Lipschitz functions in the Lipschitz pseudometric. Our results hold under either a topological or a model-theoretic condition, with the latter encompa
papers.summary_zh: 证明局部Lipschitz函数在Lipschitz伪度量下满足强大数定律，分别基于拓扑条件和模型论条件，后者涵盖o-极小结构可定义函数并大幅扩展适用范围

papers.title: Towards Miniature Humanoid Tele-Loco-Manipulation Using Virtual Reality and Reinforcement Learning
papers.abstract: Full-sized humanoid robot capabilities have grown exponentially in recent years, aiming towards general-purpose deployment in human environments. A popular control method used by manufacturers utilize
papers.summary_zh: 提出结合VR上肢遥操作与强化学习下肢平衡的微型人形机器人全身控制框架，实现高精度远程操作与稳定行走

papers.title: Persian Pixel: A large-scale synthetic OCR dataset for Persian language
papers.abstract: Optical Character Recognition (OCR) for Persian remains substantially less mature than for Latin-script languages despite Persian being spoken by more than 110 million people across multiple countries
papers.summary_zh: 针对波斯语OCR数据匮乏问题，构建首个大规模合成数据集Persian Pixel，含超百万样本，覆盖复杂连笔与变体，显著提升识别准确率
